title: Financial Edge’s Odume Festus & Access Holdings’ Kunle Aderinokun Share Insights on AI in Banking at ACAMB Conference - FinancialEDGE
description: The fourth edition of the Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference brought together industry experts to discuss the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the banking sector. The conference themed "AI and The Future of Trust: Reimagining Banking and Financial Services in a Digital First Era" provided a platform for stakeholders
html:
The fourth edition of the Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference brought together industry experts to discuss the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the banking sector.

The conference themed “AI and The Future of Trust: Reimagining Banking and Financial Services in a Digital First Era” provided a platform for stakeholders to share insights and best practices on harnessing AI to enhance customer trust and experience.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director, Financial Edge and Kunle Aderinokun, Head, Media & Public Relations at Access Holdings Plc. at the fourth edition of Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference in Lagos.
